# Design Assets\n\nThis folder contains design mockups and assets generated by Stitch AI.\n\n## Contents\n\n- **stitch_rigify_dark_premium_marketplace/** - Full design system mockups\n  - UI components and page layouts\n  - Logo variations and branding\n  - Color schemes and typography examples\n\n**Note**: These are reference designs. Actual implementation is in the codebase.
